content_body:
It was wonderful! Your home is beautiful. We will have to come back and bring our daughters and their families. We enjoyed the train ride. Such a quiet private area. We took the family to the beach this summer - but this is our type of relaxing. Andy is a supervisor over 52 people (what a headache), and I'm office manager, and unfortunately, we have to face all that soon enough. Thanks for a memorable trip.
AL
title: Office Escape to Blue Ridge
